title: aragallus minor
intro: Aragallus minor, also known as sweetroot or licorice root, is a perennial plant native to North America. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its roots, which contain glycosides, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Aragallus minor is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of soothing inflammation, promoting digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Aragallus minor include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
